site.title: Avionics Verification Intelligence Platform
site.tagline: Not an AI flight controller. A certification-aligned avionics verification intelligence platform combining a deterministic verification workbench with a bounded AI assurance layer.

common.draft_banner: DRAFT — Learning / portfolio artefact. Not certification evidence. DAL / TQL / AI-level ratings are hypotheses.

live.backend_unreachable: Backend unreachable — falling back to static content.
live.section_live_summary_sub: When the backend is up, these numbers come straight from evidence/verification-report.json.
live.section_live_models_sub: Frozen models registered under evidence/registry/ with their assurance metadata.
live.predict_intro: Calls the fault_escape model live when the intelligence endpoint is running. Pick a preset or tune the values yourself.

home.hero_sub: A deterministic verification workbench (M1–M6) and a governed AI assurance layer (Phase A–D) running from one repository.

cards.title: Deterministic Verification Workbench
cards.body: IMA-style partitioned scheduler, ARINC 429-lite, AFDX-lite, FCC / Engine / Display surrogates.

cards.title: Requirements & Coverage
cards.body: Requirement-based JSON test runner, line + MC/DC coverage, fault-injection campaigns.

cards.title: Evidence & Traceability
cards.body: Immutable evidence bundles (manifest + sha256 + replay), ingested into a Bronze/Silver/Gold lakehouse.

cards.title: Governed AI Assurance Layer
cards.body: Frozen learned components + GSN-lite assurance cases + runtime assurance shell. Never inside the control loop.

home.doesnt_h: What the platform does NOT do

platform.intro: The project is split into two clearly separated layers. Either layer stands on its own.
why: Instead of a single fly-by-wire demo, the project shows the full V&V / trace / evidence chain.
AI is added only inside what current guidance accepts (EASA Level 1·2 / FAA incremental).
The hard line is enforced in code — not promised in docs, but raised as exceptions.
platform.layer_a_body: A traditional avionics V&V pipeline. Runs end-to-end without any AI.
platform.layer_b_body: Data → models → assurance → bounded operation. Each step leaves certification-shaped artefacts.

workbench.intro: Each milestone (M1–M6) has its own docs folder and Definition of Done.

stones.body: 33 SYS + 35 HLR requirements, ICD v0, FC-01..12 safety hypotheses, ARP4754A flow.
Deterministic sim tick, IMA-style cooperative scheduler, ARINC 429-lite, AFDX-lite, hash-stable recorder.
FCC (cmd/mon lane diversity, mode reversion), Engine I/F (latch + hot/hung start), Display Computer, Data Concentrator.
JSON test runner, line + MC/DC coverage, fault-injection campaigns (detected / mitigated / escaped).
AC 20-175 / 25.1322 evaluators, mode-confusion library, HIL-lite loopback (latency / jitter / drop / reboot).
Hermetic bundle + manifest + sha256 + replay verification.

intelligence.intro: AI lives inside the verification + assurance layer only. The control loop and deterministic safety shell always retain primary authority.

phases.body: Bronze / Silver / Gold lakehouse on SQLite (ANSI SQL maps to Databricks / BigQuery / Athena). 9 Silver tables; every row reachable by run_id. Schema-drift gate fails the build on silent breakage.

3 frozen learned components: escape predictor (sklearn GBC), engine anomaly (Isolation Forest), trace gap intel (rule-based v0 + ML interface). dataset_hash + label_version + approval_state bundle. Random splits forbidden.
GSN-lite assurance case with 12 required sections. 3-state approval workflow (auto → reviewer → board) with audit log. Self-review prohibited (PromotionError). DO-330 tool classification.

Runtime assurance shell: range / rate / authority / watchdog. Shadow → Advisory → LimitedSupervised mode ladder. Loader refuses Advisory+ below board-approved. model.fit() / partial_fit() raise OnlineLearningAttempt.
README v2, two FAQs, standards mapping v2, 1-page architecture (PDF-ready), 5-minute demo script v2, six position-tailored resume bullets, elevator pitch CLI.

intelligence.hardline_h: Hard line (enforced in Phase D code)
hardline: AI lives in the verification layer only
The deterministic pipeline runs unchanged with or without AI
Models below board-approved cannot enter Advisory+ modes
Online learning is forbidden — blocked at code level

demo.intro: This single command runs all 174 tests, 6 verification cases, 3 fault campaigns, MC/DC, HF, HIL, evidence bundle, Phase A ingest, Phase B training, Phase C lint, and Phase D shadow run.
steps: Verification runner — 6 requirement-based test cases pass
Fault campaigns — classified detected / mitigated / escaped
MC/DC — 100% on the two designated decisions
Phase A — schema-drift gate + lakehouse ingest
Phase B — 3 frozen models trained + registered
Phase C — assurance case lint + change-impact gate
Phase D — engine anomaly shadow run; deterministic pipeline unaffected

standards.intro: Learning-grade mapping that demonstrates engineering fluency. No certification credit is claimed.
standards.warning: DAL / TQL / AI-level ratings here are portfolio assumptions, not certification substantiation.

rows.where: Requirements tree, MC/DC + line coverage, objective mapping
Phase C tool classification + TQL hypotheses
System requirements flow + DAL assumptions + change procedure
FC-01..12 failure conditions + safety analysis hypotheses
M2 IMA partitioning, health monitoring, fault containment
Phase B frozen=true + Phase D Shadow→Advisory ladder (Level 1·2)
Phase D runtime assurance shell + incremental adoption + OnlineLearningAttempt
Phase A lineage queries (every Silver row reachable by run_id)
OUT OF SCOPE — explicit no-environmental-test disclaimer
OUT OF SCOPE — no airborne electronic hardware activity

standards.more: Each standard has a 1-pager under docs/regulatory/.

docs.intro: M1–M6 workbench, Phase A–E intelligence, regulatory 1-pagers, demo scripts, and portfolio artefacts in one place.

items.title: FAQ — Why AI not in control loop

results.intro: Snapshot of the most recent local run. The same data is bundled into an evidence zip with sha256 self-verification.

rows.v: OK on sha256 match; non-zero exit on mismatch

about.intent: Most avionics side-projects re-implement a fly-by-wire law and stop. This one focuses on what real flight-software teams actually deal with every day: V&V, traceability, evidence, and assurance lifecycle. The structure is intentionally one you can only build if you understand the certification lifecycle.
fit: Avionics flight software (FCC / mode logic / lane diversity)
Verification & Validation engineer (runner / coverage / fault campaigns)
Display / HMI engineer (alert priority / color rule / mode latency)
Defence / space (deterministic loopback HIL + runtime guardrails)
about.disclaimer: This repository is a learning / portfolio artefact. No DAL / IDAL / TQL / AI-level rating is substantiated. See docs/regulatory/disclaimer.md for the full statement.
